label: Ancient structure gen parms
description: Parameters controlling how an ancient structure is generated and what is scattered around its perimeter.

structureLayoutDef.label: Structure layout def
structureLayoutDef.description: LayoutDef that defines the interior layout of the generated structure.

structureSizeRange.label: Structure size range
structureSizeRange.description: Random range for the structure footprint size in cells.

scatteredPrefabs.label: Scattered prefabs
scatteredPrefabs.description: Prefab groups scattered around the exterior of the generated structure.

perimeterWallDef.label: Perimeter wall def
perimeterWallDef.description: ThingDef placed as a wall around the structure perimeter.

perimeterExpandBy.label: Perimeter expand by
perimeterExpandBy.description: Number of cells to expand the perimeter wall outward from the structure edge.

perimeterWallChance.label: Perimeter wall chance
perimeterWallChance.description: Probability (0-1) that each perimeter cell receives a wall.

perimeterTerrainDef.label: Perimeter terrain def
perimeterTerrainDef.description: TerrainDef placed across the structure perimeter area.

perimeterScatterTerrain.label: Perimeter scatter terrain
perimeterScatterTerrain.description: Terrain patches scattered across the perimeter. Each element name is the TerrainDef defName; child elements are scatter parameters.

perimeterScatteredThings.label: Perimeter scattered things
perimeterScatteredThings.description: Things scattered across the perimeter. Each element name is the ThingDef defName; scalar text is the chance per 100 cells.
